title: Analytics - Location Permission Granted
scenario: Location permission choice (allow/deny) logged in Firebase analytics event "location_permission_granted" on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. When prompted for location permissions, observe the system dialog asking for Allow or Deny.
3. Tap either 'Allow' or 'Deny' on the location permission dialog.
4. Open Firebase Analytics console and navigate to the Events section.
6. Verify the event is logged with the user's choice (allow or deny).

7. In the default dashboard, check the following elements are present: a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
expected: The 'location_permission_granted' event is logged in Firebase Analytics with the user's choice (allow or deny). The default dashboard displays all expected elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
